goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should be in the 'west'.
The hotel should be in the 'cheap' price range.
Make sure you get 'postcode', 'whether they have free parking', and 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 19:45' and should leave on 'saturday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'norwich'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'departure time', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should be in the west
The hotel should be in the cheap price range
Make sure you get postcode, whether they have free parking, and star of the hotel
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 19:45 and should leave on saturday
The train should go to cambridge and should depart from norwich
Make sure you get travel time, departure time, and price
